title: Now
intro: What I am currently focused on, learning, and building right now.

items.label: Building
items.value: Improving this terminal-first portfolio and starting to turn it into a more complete product showcase.

items.label: Learning
items.value: Better frontend polish, animation systems, product storytelling, and richer UI architecture.

items.label: Exploring
items.value: Game systems, developer workflow tooling, interface feel, and more premium project presentation.
